zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Lovelace V於1583年2月12日出生在英國肯特貝黑斯達時，他的父親Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden21歲，母親Elizabeth Aucher21歲。他於大約1610年與Anne Barne在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1627年8月12日在荷蘭霍蘭享年44歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Lovelace V于1583年2月12日出生在英国肯特貝黑斯達时，他的父亲Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden21岁，母亲Elizabeth Aucher21岁。他于大约1610年与Anne Barne在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1627年8月12日在荷兰霍蘭享年44岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: William of Orange (1533-1584), Prince of Orange (1538-1584), Count of Nassau (1559-1584), and first stadholder of the United Provinces of the Netherlands, was assassinated by Burgundian Balthasar Gerard (25) with a handgun. Philip II of Spain had called for a volunteer assassin due to William's reluctance take a public stand on religious issues. William was succeeded by his 17-year-old son, Maurice of Nassau.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn was born in Leiden, the Netherlands.
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Lovelace V was born on 12 February 1583, in Bethersden, Kent, England, his father, Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Aucher, was 21. He married Anne Barne about 1610, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 August 1627, in Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 44, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Lovelace V est né le 12 février 1583, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aucher, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne Barne environ 1610, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1627, à Holland, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Lovelace V am 12. Februar 1583 in Bethersden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aucher 21. Er hat um 1610 in England Anne Barne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1627 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace V è nato il il 12 febbraio 1583 nel Bethersden, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aucher, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anne Barne circa 1610, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1627, nel Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace Vが1583年2月12日にイギリスケントベスエルスデンで生まれた時，父Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersdenは21歳，母Elizabeth Aucherは21歳であった。約1610年にイギリスでAnne Barneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1627年8月12日にオランダホーランドで44歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Lovelace V(이)가 1583년 2월 12일 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aucher(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1610년 영국에서 Anne Barne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1627년 8월 12일 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 Feb 1583–12 August 1627: 12 de fevereiro de 1583–12 de agosto de 1627
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Lovelace V nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1583, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aucher, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Barne aproximadamente 1610, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1627, em Holland, Países Baixos, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Lovelace V родился 12 февраля 1583 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aucher, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Barne около 1610 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1627 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.12 Feb 1583–12 August 1627: 12 de febrero de 1583–12 de agosto de 1627
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Lovelace V nació el 12 de febrero de 1583, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Lovelace IV, of Bethersden, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aucher, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne Barne aproximadamente 1610, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1627, en Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
